title: Fix desktop_send_to_telegram multi-monitor capture failure
summary: Add per-monitor error handling to captureAllMonitorBuffers() so a failed capture on one monitor (e.g., monitor 3) doesn't crash the entire Telegram send. Skip failed monitors and send only successful captures.
executorPrompt: Apply the src edit to fix the desktop_send_to_telegram multi-monitor capture failure. Replace lines 1691-1697 in src/gateway/desktop-tools.ts with the error-handling version. Test: call desktop_screenshot then desktop_send_to_telegram and verify it sends images to Telegram even if one monitor fails.
